title: Nonea elongata
taxonomy: Nonea elongata is classified within the family Boraginaceae. This family of flowering plants is commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. Nonea elongata belongs to the genus Nonea, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The species is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its unique elongated shape. Nonea elongata is a type of herbaceous perennial plant that thrives in dry, rocky areas.
